title: The Number I Couldn't Text
summary: Chapter 2 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Number I Couldn't Text. Theme: The number he could not text until hope became action.
sceneDescription: A phone-message memory: the number he cannot text, hope held inside a glowing screen.
